apis.description: Get details about a single item in a new quiz.

operations.notes: Get details about a single item in a new quiz.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The id of the assignment associated with the quiz.

parameters.name: item_id
parameters.description: The id of the item associated with the quiz.

apis.description: Get a list of items in a new quiz.

operations.notes: Get a list of items in a new quiz.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: no description

apis.description: Create a quiz item in a new quiz. Only +QuestionItem+ types can be created.

operations.notes: Create a quiz item in a new quiz. Only +QuestionItem+ types can be created.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: The id of the assignment associated with the quiz.

parameters.name: item[position]
parameters.description: The position of the item within the quiz.

parameters.name: item[points_possible]
parameters.description: The number of points available to score on this item. Must be positive.

parameters.name: item[entry_type]
parameters.description: The type of the item.

parameters.name: item[entry][title]
parameters.description: The question title.

parameters.name: item[entry][item_body]
parameters.description: The question stem (rich content).

parameters.name: item[entry][calculator_type]
parameters.description: Type of calculator the user will have access to during the question.

parameters.name: item[entry][feedback][neutral]
parameters.description: General feedback to show regardless of answer (rich content).

parameters.name: item[entry][feedback][correct]
parameters.description: Feedback to show if the question is answered correctly (rich content).

parameters.name: item[entry][feedback][incorrect]
parameters.description: Feedback to show if the question is answered incorrectly (rich content).

parameters.name: item[entry][interaction_type_slug]
parameters.description: The type of question. One of 'multi-answer', 'matching', 'categorization', 'file-upload', 'formula', 'ordering', 'rich-fill-blank', 'hot-spot', 'choice', 'numeric', 'true-false', or 'essay'. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about each type.

parameters.name: item[entry][interaction_data]
parameters.description: An object that contains the question data. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about this field.

parameters.name: item[entry][properties]
parameters.description: An object that contains additional properties for some question types. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about this field.

parameters.name: item[entry][scoring_data]
parameters.description: An object that describes how to score the question. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about this field.

parameters.name: item[entry][answer_feedback]
parameters.description: Feedback provided for each answer (rich content, only available on 'choice' question types).

parameters.name: item[entry][scoring_algorithm]
parameters.description: The algorithm used to score the question. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about this field.

The type of question. One of 'multi-answer', 'matching', 'categorization', 'file-upload', 'formula', 'ordering', 'rich-fill-blank',
'hot-spot', 'choice', 'numeric', 'true-false', or 'essay'. See {Appendix: Question Types} for more info about each type.

apis.description:
Get a url for uploading media for use in hot-spot question types. See the hot-spot
question type in the {Appendix: Question Types} for more details about using this endpoint.

operations.notes:
Get a url for uploading media for use in hot-spot question types. See the hot-spot
question type in the {Appendix: Question Types} for more details about using this endpoint.

parameters.name: course_id
parameters.description: no description

parameters.name: assignment_id
parameters.description: no description

QuizItem.description: Individual items within a quiz, whether they're questions, stimuli, banked content, or question banks.

id.description: the ID of the quiz item

position.description: the position of the item within the quiz. The first item in a quiz is given position 1.

points_possible.description: the number of points available to score on this item

entry_type.description: the type of the item. One of 'Item', 'Stimulus', 'BankEntry', or 'Bank'.

entry_editable.description: whether the current user can edit the item -- used internally, no need to set

stimulus_quiz_entry_id.description: the ID of the stimulus that this item is associated with. null if not associated with any stimuli.

status.description: status of the item. one of 'mutable' or 'immutable'.  Used internally, no need to set

properties.description: additional properties for the item (currently only populated by items with a BankItem entry)

entry.description:
the specific data associated with the quiz item.  These items can be either a
       QuestionItem, StimulusItem, BankEntryItem, or BankItem, depending on entry_type, and are defined
       separately

item_body.description: the question content (can include html for rich content)

calculator_type.description: type of calculator the user will have access to during the question ('none', basic' or 'scientific')

feedback.description: correct, incorrect, and general feedback for the question (see QuestionFeedback)

interaction_type_slug.description:
can be thought of as the question type. One of 'multi-answer', 'matching', 'categorization',
      'file-upload', 'formula', 'ordering', 'rich-fill-blank', 'hot-spot', 'choice', 'numeric', 'true-false',
      'essay', or 'fill-blank' (deprecated). See Appendix: Question Types for more info about each type.

interaction_data.description: an object that contains the question data. See Appendix: Question Types for more info about this field.

properties.description: an object that contains additional properties for some question types. See Appendix: Question Types for more info about this field.

scoring_data.description: describes how to score the question. See Appendix: Question Types for more info about this field.

answer_feedback.description: feedback provided for each answer (rich content, only available on 'choice' question types)

scoring_algorithm.description: the algorithm used to score the question. See Appendix: Question Types for more info about this field.

source_url.description: optional URL; not visible to students

orientation.description: where the stimulus appears relative to questions ('top' or 'left')

entry_type.description: the type of the item. Either 'Item' or 'Stimulus'.

archived.description: whether the banked item is archived

entry.description: the item (either a QuestionItem or StimulusItem, depending on entry_type)

entry_count.description: the number of items in the bank, including stimuli

item_entry_count.description: the number of items in the bank, excluding stimuli

sample_num.description: for items with a BankItem entry - the number of items to randomly select from the bank. null if all items should be included.

neutral.description: general feedback to show regardless of answer (rich content)

correct.description: feedback to show if the question is answered correctly (rich content)

incorrect.description: feedback to show if the question is answered incorrectly (rich content)
